programme.title: FishON | River Run Redemption
programme.desc: Paul and Perry kick off an adventurous journey down the Ivanhoe River, heading toward a lake that’s known to deliver steady walleye action. But this time, the fish had other plans. With walleye proving tough to track down, the duo turns to the river’s reliable residents—Northern Pike—to keep the rods bending and the spirits high. Surrounded by stunning scenery, flowing rapids, and beautiful waterfalls, this river run becomes more than just a fishing trip—it’s a reminder that the North’s wild beauty always makes the day worthwhile, no matter what’s biting.

programme.title: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures

programme.title: Xplash Ep106
programme.desc: Xplash brings you the coolest action in, on, and near water. Today we’ll get soaked in Africa's great Nile River while kayak surfing; Maya Gabeira goes in search of the biggest wave ever surfed by a woman; and our first stop takes us windsurfing in Maui.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The episode opens with Michael Bellemare of Switch It Up Inc., who shares how a simple bar-napkin sketch grew into a million-dollar operation specializing in turnkey solar, LED lighting, and EV charging. With a passion for revitalizing the trades, Michael stresses the importance of training programs and investing in people as he maps out his goal of scaling to a $100M company—and even explores franchising with Kevin. Next, teacher-turned-inventor Sean Worthington introduces Raida Tech, where a bathtub question—“What is money?”—led to a new form of data-supremacy currency and safer, uncensored AI. Sean looks to the A-Team for marketing, sales, and customer acquisition support. Then, Dale Krueger of Tangible Assets LLC explains how his coin-collecting hobby evolved into an investment platform blending art and assets, now ready to scale beyond word-of-mouth investors. Finally, Richard Simon of New Home National Title showcases his on-call title insurance service and seeks guidance on breaking into TV advertising to reach homebuyers nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: S1E4 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: S1E5 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.desc: A Royal Canadian Mounted Police sergeant named Dan Candy (Donald Sutherland) spends years tracking a young Cree man who escapes custody after being arrested for stealing livestock and is suspected of killing another Mountie. As Candy pursues him across the wilderness of Saskatchewan in the 1890s, the story explores themes of justice, duty, and the toll of obsession on both hunter and hunted

programme.title: Buffalo Bill, Jr S1E24 Rails Westward.
programme.desc: Bill falls for a pretty girl when she and her father arrive in Wileyville. He and Judge Wiley convince the newcomers to buy the stagecoach line from its shifty owner. The man is happy to sell since he knows that the railroad is building a spur to Wileyville, and his company will soon be worthless. When the pretty blonde blames Buffalo Bill for encouraging the bad business deal, the youngster determines to get her family’s money back

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean — Season 1, Episode 29: “Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean dispenses his unique brand of frontier justice when a suspicious illness spreads through the town, raising fears of foul play. As tensions rise and accusations mount, Bean must uncover the truth behind the so-called “bad medicine” while keeping order in his rough-and-tumble courtroom.

programme.title: Call of the Forest 1949
programme.desc: Bob Brand is looking for a lost gold mine. Storm Cloud makes friends with Bob’s son Bobby and to repay Bob for the help he gave the Indians, he gives a map locating the mine to the boy

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: A special agent infiltrates the notorious Reno Brothers gang in post-Civil War Indiana, posing as an outlaw to gather evidence against them while risking his life to bring the criminals to justice

programme.title: Tulsa 1949
programme.desc: Set against the roaring Oklahoma oil boom of the 1920s, Stuart Heisler’s drama follows Cherokee Lansing, a rancher’s daughter driven by vengeance after her father’s death at the hands of ruthless oilmen. With the help of Native American Jim Redbird and rugged roustabout Brad Brady, Cherokee plunges headfirst into the high-stakes world of oil drilling—where ambition, betrayal, and desire fuel every move.

programme.title: Colorado Sundown (1952)
programme.desc: In Colorado Sundown, Rex Allen stars in a Western adventure of land, greed, and justice on the frontier. When cattlemen and timber interests clash over valuable mountain property, Rex steps in to keep the peace and expose the schemers fueling the feud. With his faithful horse Koko, the comedy of Slim Pickens, and songs that echo across the range, this action-packed tale blends music, mystery, and six-gun justice under the wide Colorado sky.

programme.title: Hit the Saddle
